title: Multimeric oligonucleotides having decreased kidney clearance
abstract: The present invention relates to methods of administering to a subject multimeric oligonucleotides having monomeric subunits joined by linkers. The multimeric oligonucleotides have a molecular weight of at least about 45 kD and other characteristics, such that their clearance due to glomerular filtration is reduced. The present invention also relates to such multimeric oligonucleotides and methods of synthesizing such multimeric oligonucleotides.
claims: 1. A multimeric oligonucleotide comprising 4 or more subunits , wherein: each of the subunits is independently a single- or double-stranded oligonucleotide; each of the subunits is joined to another subunit by a covalent linker ●; at least one of the single- or double-stranded subunits within the multimeric oligonucleotide comprises a covalent linker ● joined to the 3′ terminus and a covalent linker ● joined to the 5′ terminus of a single strand within the subunit; and the molecular weight of the multimeric oligonucleotide is at least 45 kD.
